subject: chemistry
title: 18M.3.HL.TZ2.12
question_html: DNA is a biopolymer made up of nucleotides. List two components of a nucleotide.
solution_html:
Any two of:

pentose «sugar»

OR

deoxyribose

 

phosphate «group»

 

«organic» nitrogenous base

OR

nucleobase

OR

nucleic base

OR

purine

OR

pyrimidine

 

Accept names or formulas.

Accept “ribose” for M1.

Do not accept “phosphoric acid”.

Accept the four bases together: “adenine, cytosine, thymine, guanine”.

[2 marks]
